/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/acc_spmm_bench.dir/benchmark/benchmark.cpp.o CMakeFiles/acc_spmm_bench.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o acc_spmm_bench   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda/lib64 libacc_spmm_core.a /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcusparse.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
